title: Xylopicrum acuminatum
taxonomy: Xylopicrum acuminatum is classified in the family Guttiferae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the clusiaceous family. This family is a part of the larger order Malpighiales, which consists of various flowering plant species. The order Malpighiales belongs to the clade eurosids I, a subgroup within the larger clade rosid. Xylopicrum acuminatum falls under the clade angiosperms, which includes all flowering plants. It also belongs to the kingdom Plantae.
